market_context: Futures pointing lower on tech sell-off continuation and inflation concerns, though Iran conflict de-escalation provides some relief. Nvidia earnings Wednesday is major catalyst with high expectations.

predictions.reasoning: Futures down 0.4% premarket with tech sell-off continuing from previous session. Semiconductor weakness and profit-taking pressure outweigh Iran conflict de-escalation relief.
Pre-earnings positioning likely as analysts expect strong beat with 120% YoY EPS growth. Despite recent tech weakness, AI demand narrative remains intact ahead of Wednesday results.
Tech-heavy index under pressure from semiconductor sell-off continuation. High RSI levels suggest overbought conditions warranting correction despite long-term AI tailwinds.
Already down 1% premarket after Q1 earnings showed profit decline despite beating estimates. Housing affordability pressures and consumer uncertainty continue to weigh on outlook.
